CVE-2020-17497.title: eapol.c in iNet wireless daemon (IWD) through 1.8 allows attacker ...
CVE-2020-17497.description: eapol.c in iNet wireless daemon (IWD) through 1.8 allows attackers to trigger a PTK reinstallation by retransmitting EAPOL Msg4/4.

CVE-2023-52161.title: The Access Point functionality in eapol_auth_key_handle in eapol. ...
CVE-2023-52161.description: The Access Point functionality in eapol_auth_key_handle in eapol.c in iNet wireless daemon (IWD) before 2.14 allows attackers to gain unauthorized access to a protected Wi-Fi network. An attacker can complete the EAPOL handshake by skipping Msg2/4 and instead sending Msg4/4 with an all-zero key.

CVE-2024-28084.title: p2putil.c in iNet wireless daemon (IWD) through 2.15 allows attac ...
CVE-2024-28084.description: p2putil.c in iNet wireless daemon (IWD) through 2.15 allows attackers to cause a denial of service (daemon crash) or possibly have unspecified other impact because of initialization issues in situations where parsing of advertised service information fails.
